notes: Burlington composite — the original layered armor array developed for M1 Abrams. Ceramic tile (Al2O3/SiC) + glass-reinforced plastic + rubber interlayers in steel structure. RHAe ~1.8-2.2 per mm vs KE. Named after Chobham Common, UK (Chobham/Burlington). Developer: DERA/UK MoD with US collaboration. Precise construction remains classified.

source.reference: Classified US/UK joint armor program, open-source analysis
source.methodology: RHAe estimated from declassified references: M1 Abrams Burlington array performance inferred from reported protection levels vs known threats. Value 2.0 is approximate. Precise composition classified.
